home.title: GlowGuide
home.subheader: A unisex personal care guide for skincare, bodycare, haircare, and hygiene.
home.description: Explore product terms, build simple routines, and contribute safer beginner-friendly personal care knowledge through a moderated open-source workflow.

cards.skincare_text: Cleanse, moisturize, protect, and understand skin type basics.
cards.bodycare_text: Build body routines for dryness, odor, texture, and body acne support.
cards.haircare_text: Nourish your scalp and hair with targeted routines for every hair type.
cards.hygiene_text: Learn practical daily hygiene categories and product terms.

library.description: Search generic product categories and learn what each one does.
library.no_results: No matching product terms found yet.

routine.description: Choose your care area, skin type, concern, and budget to get a simple starter routine.
routine.no_match: No exact database match yet. Try a broader concern or flexible budget.
routine.disclaimer: GlowGuide is educational and does not diagnose or treat medical conditions. For persistent irritation, infection, severe acne, or allergic reactions, consult a qualified professional.

contribute.description: Submit beginner-friendly content suggestions. Contributions stay pending until reviewed.
contribute.error_empty: Please add a title and proposed content.

review.description: For the MVP, this review screen is protected by a simple demo passcode.
review.passcode_hint: Enter the demo passcode to review pending submissions.
review.save_success: Review saved. Refresh the page to update the list.
